'''hanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:full|full]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:full|full]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hanate|hanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hanatesher|hanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hanatesherĂ«m|hanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hanatero|hanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hanateshĂ«|hanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hanateshĂ«m|hanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihanatero|gokihanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihanateshĂ«|gokihanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihanateshĂ«m|gokihanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohanankerom|gohanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohanankeshĂ«|gohanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohanankeshĂ«m|gohanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohanankeya|gohanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hanaterom|hanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hanatemu|hanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hanateya|hanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihanaterom|gokihanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihanatemu|gokihanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihanateya|gokihanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hananate|hananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hananatesher|hananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hananatesherĂ«m|hananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hananatero|hananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hananateshĂ«|hananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hananateshĂ«m|hananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihananatero|gokihananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihananateshĂ«|gokihananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihananateshĂ«m|gokihananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohananankerom|gohananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohananankeshĂ«|gohananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohananankeshĂ«m|gohananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohananankeya|gohananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hananaterom|hananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hananatemu|hananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hananateya|hananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihananaterom|gokihananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihananatemu|gokihananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihananateya|gokihananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠnĂŠte|hĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠnĂŠtesher|hĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠnĂŠtero|hĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠnĂŠtero|gokihĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠnĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠnĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠnĂŠterom|hĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠnĂŠtemu|hĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠnĂŠteya|hĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠnĂŠterom|gokihĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠnĂŠteya|gokihĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafnafte|hafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafnaftesher|hafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafnaftesherĂ«m|hafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafnaftero|hafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafnafteshĂ«|hafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafnafteshĂ«m|hafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafnaftero|gokihafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafnafteshĂ«|gokihafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafnafteshĂ«m|gokihafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafnafnkerom|gohafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafnafnkeshĂ«|gohafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafnafnkeshĂ«m|gohafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafnafnkeya|gohafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafnafterom|hafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafnaftemu|hafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafnafteya|hafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafnafterom|gokihafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafnaftemu|gokihafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafnafteya|gokihafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
